description:
# Phase 4: Observability Platform

Launch Supabase-backed observability platform tracking component health across consumer projects. @helix/telemetry SDK, Panopticon v2 dashboard, usage analytics, error tracking, version drift detection. Months 13-18.

## Phases
1. Build @helix/telemetry client SDK
2. Build Supabase observability backend
3. Build Panopticon v2 multi-project dashboard
title: [Epic] Phase 4: Observability Platform
